stemHtml: The Operator carries the Operations Manual (OM) inside the aircraft but they hope to reduce the amount of weight and space on board:

options.a: The entire Operations Manual can be kept at the aerodrome, and removed from the aircraft.
options.b: The operator can carry only the parts relevant to the flight crew.
options.c: The entire Operations Manual must be carried on board the aircraft at all times.
options.d: The operator has to ask the crew members to carry only some of the OM parts concerning crew duty.
